name: United Acquisition Corp. I
business: United Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or other business combination with one or more businesses. It has no current operations and does not sell any products or services. The company intends to use proceeds from its initial public offering to consummate a business combination.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until 24 months from the closing of the initial public offering, or such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate an initial business combination.
